titleStmt.title: SII 38.230: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 230. (A.R. No. 230 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west base of the Gauḷīśvara shrine, in the same temple.

summary.p: Begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Pugaḻ sūḻnda puṇari.

Records that an individual, kiḻān Puliaḍigaḷ Siṅgaḷāntakan alias Kulōttuṅgachōḻa Viḻiñattaraiyan of Ānāṅkūr in Panaiyūr-nāḍu in Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, gifted ninety sheep inorder to burn a perpetual lamp to the god at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. Two shepherds of the street, Tribhuvanasundarachēri, who received the sheep agreed to supply 90 nāḻi of ghee every year to burn the said lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻcūḻntapuṇari Akaḻcūḻnta puviyil ponnemi yaḷavun tannemi naṭātti viḷaṅku cayamakaḷai yiḷaṅ‘ṅ’ is engraved over kokopparuvattuc cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇampuṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayilmunaik kontaḷavaraicar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut toḷvalikāṭṭi porppari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭit teṉṟicait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭai nannilap pāvai taṉimaiyun tavirntu ṅ kol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭaiyiruṉila viḷākat teṅkaṇūn tan(ṉ)tu tiruṉilam veṇṇilāt tikaḻa voru taṉi meruvil puli viḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟ ṟivāntarattup pūpālar tiṟai viṭutanta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa viḷaṅkiya tennavan karuntalait ta
ṭat tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Innāḷ piṟakulp piṟai pol niṟmiḻaiyenṉuñ colletir koṭiṟ ṟallatu tankai villetir koṭā vikkalan kallatānaṅkila tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena tuṅkapattiriyaḷavum Eṅkaṇum paṭaveṅkaḷiṟum viṭṭa tanmāṉamuṅ kūṟina viramu
ṅ ki(ṭa)ṭappa Eṟina malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta natikaḷuñ cuḻaṉṟuṭaintoṭa viḻuṉṭaRead viḻuṉtavirameṟkaṭalaḷavu talaivirit talamarak kuṭaticait tanṉāṭukaḷuntu tānun tātaiyum palnāḷiṭṭa palapalamutukum payaṉṟetir māṟiya cayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu koṭutta pukaḻuñ celliyum vāḷaraviṭṭa miṭan taiyariṭṭamu miḷātu koṭunta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicai kai(o)kkoṇṭār muntiruppuyattilaṅkalum polvarmuntiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mevalāṇaiṅka virasiṁhāsanattup puvanamuḻu
tuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷina kovirāja kecaripanmarānavuṭaiyār śrī kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu pattāvatu rājentra coḻavaḷanāṭṭup panainai is engraved below.yūr nāṭṭu Ānāṅkūrk kuṉṟaṅkiḻān puliaṭikaḷ ciṅkaḷā
ntakanāna kulottuṅkacoḻaviḻiñattaraiyan śrīuṭaiya śrī tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkkuc cantirātittavaṟ nontā viḷakku Oṉṟerivataṟku neyyaṭṭit tiruvoṟṟiyūrt tirupuvanacuntaracceri maṉṟāṭi puṉṉaicuppiramaṇṇiyum tirumaṇikāḷiṅkanum Araṅka nampiyeṟanum vāṇantirupporiyum InnālvaruṅThis portion is damaged. Another reading is nālva[r*vaca]ṅkuṭutta cāvāmuvāp perāṭu (ney) toṇṇūṟuṅ koṇṭu Āṇṭuvarai Aḷakkak kaṭava ney toṇṇuṟṟu nāḻi Itu panmāyeśvararakṣaiḥ Aṟamaṟavaṟka Aṟamallatu tuṇaiyillai ...§
Digital edition of SII 38.230 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
